benefits.description: Describes NAD+ as more useful for older folks; mentions elderly user felt it was like a shot of cocaine to her system

side_effects.description: Subq in glute is spicy and burns if not reconstituted with special BAC water or lidocaine; NAD+ has pH around 3

protocol_notes: Administers NAD+ subQ in glute; uses BAC water (pH ~6.0) or NAD water (~8.5) to reduce burn; mentions pH of NAD+ is around 3
